pains.title: You study for hours… and still don’t feel ready
items: My notes are scattered across PDFs, slides, and docs. Turning them into practice feels like manual labor.
I keep rereading everything, but when I actually need it, I’m not sure what I remember.
It feels clear when I read it… but if I don’t review, it’s gone the next day.
I always plan to study gradually, and then end up cramming right before the deadline.
The AI hallucinates, and I can’t edit the quizzes. So I’m stuck learning from mistakes that aren’t even mine.

benefits.title: Stop rereading. Start remembering

items.question: What can I upload?
items.answer: Common formats like PDF and text work great. We’re expanding support continuously.

items.question: How does QuizBuddy use my files?
items.answer: Content is processed to generate questions and summaries for your sessions. You control retention settings.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Encryption in transit and sensible access controls. Share only what you choose on Team plans.
